briefdescription.para: Column Mask.
Row shift value.
This function sends IPI request to program eFuses with user provided data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the data structure where the eFUSE data to be programmed is stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the eFUSE programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteIVs

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program IV eFuses with user provided data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the data structure where the eFUSE data to be programmed is stored
Flag that tells weather to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link Shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const XNvm_PpkType PpkRevoke, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseRevokePpk

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program PPK_INVLD eFuse requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Type of PPK_INVLD to be revoked
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 RevokeId, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program revoke id eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
RevokeId number to be revoked
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 UserFuseAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteUserFuses

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program User eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfuseUserData structure where the user provided data to be programmed
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const XNvm_IvType IvType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadIv

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read IV eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the IV eFuse data
Type of the IV to read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 RevokeIdAddr, const XNvm_RevocationId RevokeIdNum)

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Revocation ID eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Revocation ID eFuse data
Revocation ID to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Puf helper data requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfusePufHdAddr structure where the user provided helper data to be programmed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Puf helper data requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Puf helper data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 AesKeyCrc, const XNvm_AesKeyType AesKeyType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseAesKeyCrcCheck

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to check given CRC is matched with calculated CRC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
CRC value of the AES key which needs to be checked

Type of AES key Supported key types:
XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY
XNVM_EFUSE_USER_KEY0
XNVM_EFUSE_USER_KEY1

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the CRC matches
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION If there is a CRC verification failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API
